title: Veteran VR Studio Survios Reportedly Sees Critical Layoffs
description: Employees LinkedIn posts suggest that Survios, the developer of nine VR games over the course of the past decade including Alien: Rogue Incursion, has laid off much of its staff.

title: Dimensional Double Shift Sporelando DLC Impressions: Teamwork Makes The Dream Work
description: Dimensional Double Shift's Sporelando DLC takes the VR co-op job simulator to central Florida.

title: Birdseed VR Full Release Lands On Quest 3
description: Birdseed VR's full release on Meta Quest 3 brings updates including multiplayer, new bird behaviors, and an in-game shop full of new gear and cosmetics.

title: Dark Fantasy Multiplayer VR Game Reave Ends Development
description: Reave, a co-op dark fantasy action game, is ending development, says developer Alta.

title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City Review - Go Ninja Go Ninja Go
description: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City as a whole is better than the sum of its parts, and lives up to its source material.

title: Age Of Dinosaurs Is An Immersive Expedition Done Right
description: Age of Dinosaurs is the kind of location-based VR experience worth buying a ticket for, even if you already have VR at home.

title: Will Meta's New Prescription Ray-Bans Truly Accommodate the Bespectacled?
description: Will Meta's latest "prescription focused" Ray-Ban smart glasses truly accommodate the bespectacled masses who rely on their lenses to experience the world in focus?

title: Beat Saber Gets The Prodigy Music Pack With 6 New Songs
description: Out now on Quest and Steam, Beat Saber's The Prodigy Music Pack brings one of the most recognizable and influential electronic acts to your VR headset.

title: Five Nights At Freddy's: Secret Of The Mimic Available Now On PlayStation VR2
description: Five Nights at Freddy's: Secret of the Mimic is playable now on PS VR2, with PC and Quest to come later.

title: A Long Survive's PC VR And Playstation VR2 Ports Delayed To May
description: Co-op shooter A Long Survive's release on PC VR and PS VR2 has been pushed back to May.

title: EXD - Extra Dimensional Review: A Dark & Disturbing VR Adventure
description: Though EXD - Extra Dimensional is a truly stunning showcase for VR graphics, and an amazing auditory experience in dread and fear, it's also a game that doesn't quite reach its full potential.

title: Legendary Tales Planning A Sandbox Mode & Friendly Fire Feature Later This Year
description: After the release of its recent DLC, VR ARPG Legendary Tales has laid out its future roadmap, including a sandbox mode and friendly fire feature expected later this year.

title: Walkabout Mini Golf Announces New Blokhaven DLC Coming On May 7
description: Walkabout Mini Golf announced a new DLC course called 'Blokhaven', set to launch May 7 on all of its supported VR platforms.

title: Space Explorers: The Infinite Is The Closest I’ve Felt To Life In Orbit
description: While virtually exploring the International Space Station in Space Explorers: THE INFINITE, we discovered the closest feeling to actually living in orbit.

title: Paranormal Activity: The Lost Soul Will Be Delisted 'Soon' Due To License Expiration
description: Paranormal Activity: The Lost Soul will be removed from all VR & flatscreen platforms soon due to its license from Paramount expiring.

title: Pluto TV’s Immersive Quest App Gets The Atmosphere Right, But Leaves Questions
description: Pluto TV introduced a new immersive viewing app on Quest. Here's what it offers, what works, and where it comes up short.

title: Kamitsubaki City Review: So Close To Being One Of VR’s Best Narrative Adventures
description: It’s surprisingly difficult to recommend one of the best narrative VR experiences, Kamitsubaki City.

title: The UploadVR Showcase is coming June 12 - Applications Open Now!
description: The UploadVR Showcase will premiere June 12.

title: Into The Radius 2 Exits Early Access On PC & Looks To The Future
description: Into The Radius 2's PC VR full release is available now - and CM Immersive is already planning its future updates.

title: Free DIRECTV Streaming App Now Live On Quest
description: A free DIRECTV streaming app is now available on Quest headsets.

title: VR FPS Contractors Showdown: Exfil Zone Launches PvE Mode In Latest Wipe Update
description: The fourth wipe update for VR extraction shooter Contractors: Showdown ExFilZone is now live.

title: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes Review - A Faithfully Terrifying Adaptation
description: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes is an excellent translation of the series to VR, lacking only in more robust VR comfort options.
